App.vue px-4 sm:px-7; HealthHeader min-w-0 sm:min-w-[300px] + gap-4 sm:gap-[30px]; ContextBar & ArtifactsVersionBar gap-2 sm:gap-4. Verify: cd frontend && npm run build.

